test_cases.title: Verify user can login with valid credentials
test_cases.resolution_summary: Core infrastructure and base classes exist in framework. Login page object (pages/hpid_page.py) exists but lacks specific locators for standard login form. Dashboard helper exists but logout functionality is not documented. Significant components need creation for complete login-logout flow automation.

relevant_files.reason: Browser lifecycle management - required for every test to initialize and manage browser instances
Configuration management for base URLs, timeouts, and environment settings
Test reporting and validation - session-scoped fixture for capturing test results
Pytest configuration with fixtures: stage_callback, tc_tracer, main_execution, reporter, session_cleanup
YAML test configuration loading - provides yaml_data, testcase_id fixtures
Base class for all page objects - provides common page interaction methods. Required when any page object is included.
HP ID authentication page - handles login/sign-in form elements. This is the actual login page in AURA framework (not 'LoginPage').
Dashboard overview page - landing page after successful login. GOD NODE with 160 edges. Handles dashboard elements.
Dashboard navigation menu - handles side menu elements including navigation links. Referenced in framework but locators not fully documented in KB.
HP ID authentication helper - orchestrates sign-in flow. KB confirms sign_in(page, email, password) method exists.
Dashboard access orchestration - handles navigation to dashboard with authentication. KB confirms access(page, tenant_email) and sees_status_card(page) methods exist.
Common test utilities - setup, email generation, account creation, screenshot capture, wait utilities. Required foundation file.

pages/hpid_page.py.note: KB does not confirm specific locators for standard login form (username_input, password_input, login_button). HPIDPage exists but its locators are not documented in KB chunks provided.

pages/overview_page.py.note: KB confirms OverviewPage exists as GOD NODE but does not document specific locators for user_name_display, navigation_menu, or dashboard elements.

pages/dashboard_side_menu_page.py.note: KB confirms billing_shipping_link exists. Other navigation menu locators not documented.

test_cases.flow_pattern: Navigate to application URL → Load login page (HPIDPage) → Enter username in email field → Enter password → Click login button → Navigate to dashboard (OverviewPage) → Verify dashboard displayed → Verify user name displayed → Verify navigation menu visible → Verify logout button visible → Click logout button → Verify redirected to login page

components_to_create.name: email_input
components_to_create.description: Email/username input field locator on login page. Likely selector: [data-testid='email'] or #username or #email
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists in HPIDPage. Test step 2 requires entering username in email field.

components_to_create.name: password_input
components_to_create.description: Password input field locator on login page. Likely selector: [type='password'] or #password
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists in HPIDPage. Test step 3 requires entering password.

components_to_create.name: sign_in_button
components_to_create.description: Login/Sign-in submit button locator. Likely selector: [data-testid='sign-in-btn'] or button with text 'Login' or 'Sign In'
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists in HPIDPage. Test step 4 requires clicking login button.

components_to_create.name: login_form
components_to_create.description: Login form container locator for visibility verification. Likely selector: form or .login-form or #loginForm
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists. Test steps 1 and 10 require verifying login form is visible.

components_to_create.name: navigate_to_login
components_to_create.description: Method to navigate directly to login page URL. Should use base_url from settings and navigate to login path.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists in HPIDPage. Test step 1 requires navigating to login page.

components_to_create.name: enter_credentials
components_to_create.description: Method to enter username and password. Parameters: (email: string, password: string). Should clear fields, type values, and verify entry.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test steps 2-3 require entering credentials. Could use existing enter_text from BasePageObject but need wrapper method.

components_to_create.name: click_login_button
components_to_create.description: Method to click login/sign-in button and wait for navigation. Should wait for URL change and dashboard page load.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test step 4 requires clicking login button with navigation handling.

components_to_create.name: verify_login_page_displayed
components_to_create.description: Assertion method to verify login page is displayed with login form visible. Should check URL, page title, and form presence.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test steps 1 and 10 require verifying login page is displayed.

components_to_create.name: user_name_display
components_to_create.description: User name display element locator on dashboard. Likely selector: .username or .user-name or #userName or [data-testid='user-name']
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists in OverviewPage. Test step 6 requires verifying user name is displayed.

components_to_create.name: navigation_menu
components_to_create.description: Navigation menu container locator. Likely selector: nav or .navbar or .navigation or #mainNav
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists in DashboardSideMenuPage. Test step 7 requires verifying navigation menu is visible.

components_to_create.name: logout_button
components_to_create.description: Logout button locator. Likely selector: button with text 'Logout' or 'Sign Out' or [data-testid='logout-btn']
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists in any dashboard page. Test steps 8-9 require logout button interaction.

components_to_create.name: dashboard_container
components_to_create.description: Dashboard main container locator for visibility verification. Likely selector: #dashboard or .dashboard-container or .main-content
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists. Test step 5 requires verifying dashboard container is visible.

components_to_create.name: user_info_section
components_to_create.description: User information section locator. Likely selector: .user-info or #userProfile or .user-section
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this locator exists. Test step 5 requires verifying user info section is displayed.

components_to_create.name: verify_dashboard_displayed
components_to_create.description: Assertion method to verify dashboard page is displayed. Should check URL contains /dashboard or /home, page title, and dashboard container visibility.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test step 5 requires verifying dashboard is displayed after login.

components_to_create.name: get_user_name_text
components_to_create.description: Method to retrieve displayed user name text. Returns string. Should wait for element visible then get text content.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test step 6 requires getting user name text for verification.

components_to_create.name: verify_navigation_menu_visible
components_to_create.description: Assertion method to verify navigation menu is visible with all menu items present.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test step 7 requires verifying navigation menu visibility.

components_to_create.name: logout
components_to_create.description: Method to perform logout action. Should click logout button, wait for navigation to login page, and verify logout success. Parameters: (page). No logout method documented in KB.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not document any logout functionality in DashboardHelper or any page object. Test step 9 requires logout action.

components_to_create.name: click_logout_button
components_to_create.description: Method to click logout button and wait for navigation. Should handle potential dropdown menu if logout is nested.
components_to_create.reason: KB does not confirm this method exists. Test step 9 requires clicking logout button.

execution_order.component: HPIDPage.enter_credentials(username, password) OR HPIDHelper.sign_in(page, email, password)
execution_order.status: PARTIAL - HPIDHelper.sign_in EXISTS but page-level method TO_CREATE

execution_order.component: Wait for navigation to login page

critical_dependencies: helper/dashboard_helper.py depends on pages/overview_page.py, pages/privacy_banner_page.py, pages/dashboard_side_menu_page.py
missing_dependencies: pages/privacy_banner_page.py - not included but may be needed if privacy banner appears after login

global_notes.framework_pattern: Page Object Model with Helper orchestration layer
global_notes.authentication_approach: AURA uses HPIDPage (not LoginPage) for authentication. HPIDHelper orchestrates sign-in flow. DashboardHelper handles post-login dashboard access.
global_notes.logout_gap: No logout functionality documented in KB. This is a significant gap requiring component creation.
global_notes.locator_verification_status: KB does not provide detailed locator listings for HPIDPage or OverviewPage. Locators must be created based on actual application inspection.
global_notes.test_case_complexity: Medium - standard login-logout flow but requires significant component creation due to KB documentation gaps.
global_notes.token_reduction_estimate: 85% - resolved to 12 files from 85 total framework files
